identity.claim: idea-engine PR #314 → main 1c56a01 (control/claims/claude-verdict-047-37-rule.md; number RESERVES, never the position)
identity.title: the 37% rule off its home objective — the exact cardinal price of look-then-leap's folk cutoff

frame.statement: N candidates, i.i.d. U[0,1] values arriving in uniform random order (equivalently a uniform random permutation of overall ranks; rank 1 = best); N known, accept/reject on the spot, no recall. Policy family = the cutoff rules CR(r): observe the first r without committing, then accept the first subsequent running record.
frame.values: the overall rank-k candidate is worth (N+1-k)/(N+1) exactly (the U[0,1] order-statistics mean); E[V] of a policy = sum_k P(select rank k) * (N+1-k)/(N+1), an ended-empty walk contributing 0
frame.model_basis: known-N, no-recall, cutoff-family, uniform values — the folk rule's OWN canonical frame; the single most-likely-to-flip alternative is the VALUE DISTRIBUTION (heavy tails reward late leaps — the named follow-up head, both arms' machinery reusable); unknown-N, recall, interview costs, and non-cutoff threshold policies are out of the registered scope by design. The optimal cardinal policy is a threshold rule OUTSIDE the cutoff family, so every regret measured here is a LOWER bound on the cost against full optimality.

cutoff_family.definition: CR(r), r in {1..N-1}: observe the first r, then accept the first subsequent running record
cutoff_family.note: full census: every (N, r) cell, N in the grid, r in {1..N-1} — 4+9+19+49+99+199 = 379 cells × 2 objectives (P_best, E[V]) × 2 conventions (must-choose, walk-away)

must_choose.rule: if no record is accepted after position r, take candidate N
must_choose.never_leap_identity: P(take last | must-choose) = r/(N-1) exactly (take-last = the position-N candidate is selected, whether as a record or forced)

walk_away.rule: if no record is accepted after position r, end empty with payoff 0

conventions.convention_identity: E_must[V] - E_walk[V] = r/(2(N+1)) on every cell, both sides independently computed
conventions.rank_sum_identities: selected-rank distribution sums to 1 (must-choose) and to 1 - r/N (walk-away)

measured.dV: dV(N) = E_must[V](r*_V(N)) - E_must[V](r_folk(N)); r*_V(N) = exact integer argmax of E_must[V] over the full cutoff grid, ties reported
measured.B: B(N) = P(bottom-half hire under CR(r_folk), must-choose, forced-last leg included) — computed from Arm B's selected-rank distribution including the take-candidate-N leg's rank distribution

REJECT.label: the 37% rule is objective-robust — cite it freely, one cutoff serves both goals
REJECT.rule: dV(N) <= 1/50 at EVERY swept N (checked FIRST — the folk-vindicating strict claim)

APPROVE.label: the objective fork is first-order — 37% is a rank-obsession tax at scale
APPROVE.rule: dV(N) >= 1/20 AND B(N) >= 3/20 at every swept N >= 50

NULL.label: anything else — a legitimate reportable outcome
NULL.rule: the exact per-N frontier table {dV, B, dR, r*_V} is the citable pin; neither '37% is optimal, full stop' nor '37% is broken' may be cited as settled

bands.note: pre-registered BEFORE any runner code exists; the two decision bands are DISJOINT by construction (1/50 < 1/20); exact Fraction comparisons only; an honest NULL lands as a finalized verdict, not a re-run request

anchors.note: the classic anchors are reproduced as ANCHORS, never bands — the existence side (known N, rank-only feedback, payoff = 1 iff the single best is chosen → ~N/e cutoff optimal, P(best) → 1/e) is textbook-settled

e_bracket.rule: 271828182845/10^11 < e < 271828182846/10^11; floor(N/e) computed under BOTH bracket endpoints must agree per N (asserted); the floor(N/e) cutoff variant is reporting-only
e_bracket.one_over_e_context: P_best(r_folk, N) is reported against the 1/e limit via the same rational bracket (reporting-only)

arm_A_closed_forms.note: the drafting hand-derivation — independently re-verifying it is exactly what Arm B and the census gate exist for

arm_B.description: independent combinatorial rank census: the joint distribution of (selected position j, selected overall rank k) by direct finite counting — binomial-ratio terms of the C(N-k, j-1)/C(N-1, j-1) family plus the take-at-N legs; no integrals, no values; P_best read off the rank-1 row, E[V] through sum_k P(rank k)*(N+1-k)/(N+1)
arm_B.independence_note: derived independently from first principles, NOT a re-arrangement of Arm A's formulas

census_gate.rule: full permutation enumeration tallying both objectives, both conventions, and the full selected-rank distribution at every r — must equal BOTH arms exactly (the algorithm-free third arm)

gates_run_invalid_on_failure: Arm A ≡ Arm B by EXACT RATIONAL EQUALITY on every (N, r, objective, convention) cell
full permutation census at N in {5,6,7} equal to BOTH arms exactly
classic anchors: P_best(1,3) = 1/2; N=4: r*=1 with 11/24; N=5: r*=2 with 13/30
convention identity E_must[V] - E_walk[V] = r/(2(N+1)) on every cell, both sides independently computed
never-leap identities: P(take last | must-choose) = r/(N-1); P(end empty | walk-away) = r/N
per-N floor agreement of floor(N/e) under the rational e-bracket (the floor(N/e) variant is reporting-only)
reporting_only_legs: the WALK-AWAY frontier, both objectives (the convention flip visible, never decision-entangled)
dR(N) = P_best(r*_R) - P_best(r*_V) and the folk cutoff's own-objective shortfall P_best(r*_R) - P_best(r_folk)
selected-rank quartiles at r_folk / r*_R / r*_V
P_best(r_folk, N) against the 1/e limit (via the rational bracket)
r*_V(N) against the sqrt(N)-1 calculus prediction

seed_registry.note: ZERO seeds drawn — zero RNG, zero floats anywhere in computation (byte-identical re-run BY CONSTRUCTION, platform-independent); the PROPOSAL 035 registry high-water 20261284 is left unchanged for the next seeded head

drafting_liveness_nonbinding.B_bracket: a 200k-draw drafting MC brackets B near 0.19 against the 3/20 = 0.15 band — the genuinely open number; the forced-last leg alone contributes ~ r_folk/(2(N-1)) ~= 0.186
drafting_liveness_nonbinding.expected_landing: APPROVE; NULL via the B conjunct genuinely reachable; REJECT live only through a derivation-scale surprise (which the dual-arm + census gates exist to catch)
drafting_liveness_nonbinding.note: sanity context only — disclosed at drafting, CANNOT bind or flip the decision; the measurement wins on any divergence, disclosed
